departments.name: Intake Routing
departments.purpose: Classify requests, assign lane context, and decide whether temporary linking is justified.

departments.name: Build Execution
departments.purpose: Carry out service-local implementation and integration work inside the independent repository.

departments.name: Specialist Studio
departments.purpose: Perform domain-specific high-skill work that should not be generalized into the central governance core.

departments.name: Review Gate
departments.purpose: Evaluate outputs, catch regressions, and determine whether the work may progress toward release.

departments.name: Release Council
departments.purpose: Approve release posture, confirm rollback readiness, and authorize final production movement.
